title: BNY Mellon 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
text: NEW YORK , March 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- As previously announced, the BNY Mellon 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held at 240 Greenwich Street, New York, New York 10286 on Tuesday, April 12, 2022, at 9:00 a.m. ET. To ensure that we are able to accommodate all stockholders that seek to attend while also following special health and safety protocols in an orderly fashion, we are requiring all stockholders that wish to attend the annual meeting in person to register in advance.

title: BNY Mellon (BK) Fined $11.8M for Breaching Outsourcing Laws
text: Central Bank of Ireland charges fine on a unit of BNY Mellon (BK) for breaking rules on outsourcing fund administration services and providing inaccurate information to regulators.

title: BNY Mellon (BK) Pulls Back From Russia, Expects Revenue Decline
text: BNY Mellon (BK) expects a $100-million one-time reduction in first-quarter 2022 revenues as it ceases the new banking business in Russia.

title: BNY Mellon expects $100-million revenue hit in first quarter from Russia pullback
text: Bank of New York Mellon Corp said on Thursday it has paused new banking business in Russia and expects a $100-million revenue impact in the first quarter as it joins a host of companies pulling out from the country after it invaded Ukraine.

title: Bank of New York Mellon's Robin Vince Promoted to President, CEO
text: Bank of New York Mellon has said that vice chair Robin Vince will be the company's new CEO, a Reuters report said Thursday (March 10). He'll replace Todd Gibbons, who's retiring this year.

title: BNY Mellon Announces Leadership Succession Plan Naming Robin Vince CEO-Elect
text: NEW YORK, March 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation ("BNY Mellon") (NYSE: BK) announced today that Thomas P. (Todd) Gibbons has decided to retire as Chief Executive Officer and member of the Board of Directors on August 31, 2022, after a distinguished 36-year career with the company.
